page_content:
238 GEOL - Geology

GEOL342 Sedimentation and Stratigraphy (4 Credits)

Description, origin, and distribution of sediments and sedimentary rocks. Prerequisite: GEOL120 or GEOL100; and GEOL110; and GEOL322. And CHEM103; or (CHEM131 and CHEM132); or (CHEM135 and CHEM136). Restriction: Permission of instructor is required of non-degree-seeking students.
